groups.title: Sports Photography Course Registration
groups.desc:
Questions 1-6
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: Caller's name: Chris Johnson The level of the selected course: suitable for $1$ How to register: no need for an $2$ Cost: $$3$ Date available: next course, beginning $4$ Telephone number: $5$ Requirement: bring two photos of different $6$

questions.title: The level of the selected course: suitable for 【   】
How to register: no need for an 【   】
Requirement: bring two photos of different 【   】

groups.title: Curriculum
groups.desc:
Questions 7-10
Complete the table below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.

content:
– Introduction by the instructor
– How to choose the appropriate $7$

– Workshop of how to $9$ pictures
– Advice on how to $10$ pictures

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Good morning.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Community Learning Centre.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: What can I do for you?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Oh, hello.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I'm calling about the sports photography course you offer.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I learned about it from an advert somewhere in the newspaper.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: OK, may I have your name, please?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: It's Chris Johnson.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Thank you, Mr. Johnson.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Is there anything in particular you would like to know?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I'm eager to improve my photography skills.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: You know, my son has just joined the school football team this semester, and I want to keep a visual record of all these precious moments.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: But when I took shots, they were often too blurry.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: You see, I'm no expert.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: So I'd like to find out about the level of the course to see if it's suitable for me.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Well, this course is intended for beginners only.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: But there will be an advanced course for experienced photographers next semester.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That's good to know.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I think this course works for me just fine.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Do I have to go for an interview to register?

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: There is no need to do that.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: We have plenty of vacancies right now.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: So if you plan to register, I can sign you up over the phone.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Great.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: But before that, how much does it cost?

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: It was 45 dollars last year for a single student.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Luckily, this year we have more funding, so the price has gone down to 38 dollars.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Oh, good.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: So when will the next course start?

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Let me check.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Just a minute … It's Monday today, so there was a course that ended just last weekend.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Then there is another one starting from April 17th.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: But if you miss this one, the next one is from May 1st.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That's too late.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I'll just register for the next course then.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: May I take your phone number?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Sure.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: OK, I've made a note of that.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: When you come to take the first lesson, please bring two photos that you've taken.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Is there any special requirement for the photos?

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Yes, you reminded me.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: The weather of the two shots should be different.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Like one on a sunny day and another on a snowy day?

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Yes, exactly.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: So apart from the photos, do I need to prepare anything else for the course?

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Nothing more.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Do you have a syllabus for the course?

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Sure, you can download it from our website.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Just key in 'Community Learning Centre of Pinewood'.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: You can also come over to the centre and get a copy.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I'll just download it online.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: But can you please introduce the course in detail?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: The course covers two days, right?

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: On Saturday morning, the instructor will explain all the basics of amateur and professional sports photography and the differences between them, followed by instructions on the use of specific equipment for various sports, like long lenses and monopods for shooting football matches.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That's exactly what I need to know.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: What about the rest of the course?

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: On Saturday afternoon, there is normally a workshop on the technical side of things.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: For the photos that your classmates have brought, you'll have to work together to decide the best position to take these shots.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Oh, that's interesting.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: On Sunday, there is a workshop taking place in a computer-equipped room where you'll learn to edit different shots.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That sounds challenging.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Indeed, it is.

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: There is also a section on some tricks to sell them.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: To magazines and newspapers, you mean?

transcript.speaker: Official
transcript.en: Yes, mostly to the publishing industry.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Um … I'd love to …

1.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 course、suitable；提示词 for，此处应填名词。
题目解析：根据 level 和 suitable 可预判，空白处要填写的是所选课程级别适合的对象。注意做题时不要盯着 suitable 或介词 for 搜寻，因为这两个词都很容易发生替换，而应搜寻定位词 course 附近符合预判的词汇。答案句为："Well, this course is intended for beginners only."其中 intended for 替换了题干中的 suitable for。因此答案为 beginners。

2.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 no need；提示词 an，此处应填元音开头的单数名词。
题目解析：根据 no need 可预判，空白处要填写的词会搭配否定信息出现。本题与上一题衔接较快，注意通过对话语义判断题目的推进，题目的难点在于答案出现在了提问当中，即先给出答案信息，然后通过回答给出答案的否定信息，所以在听的过程中注意随时抓取符合题干要求的词汇。答案句为："Do I have to go for an interview to register? There is no need to do that."因此答案为 interview。

3.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Cost；提示词 $，此处应填数字。
题目解析：本题考查对数字的反应速度以及对干扰信息的辨识。定位词 Cost 原词重现，先是出现了干扰信息 45 dollars，不过它对应的时间是 last year。真正的答案信息为："… this year we have more funding, so the price has gone down to 38 dollars."因此答案为 38。

4.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 next course；提示词 Date，此处应填日期。
题目解析：根据 Date、next course 和 beginning 可预判，空白处要填写的是所选课程开始的日期。注意 next course 为题干条件限定，所填日期要符合这一条件。先是听到定位词 next course 原词出现在提问中，注意听随后回答中出现的日期："Then there is another one starting from April 17th. But if you miss this one, the next one is from May 1st."其中 another one 对应 next course，starting from 替换了题干中的 beginning（从……开始），而第二个日期 May 1st 为干扰信息，它是下下次课程的时间。因此答案为 April 17(th) 或 17(th) April。

5.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Telephone number；提示词 Telephone number，此处应填电话号码。
题目解析：本题同样考查对数字的反应速度。录音中没有出现干扰信息，较为简单，在听到询问 phone number 时，跟上录音记下号码即可。因此答案为 0713 9587 302。通常，雅思听力中出现的电话号码为 6 至 11 位，平时要注意加强数字听写的单项练习。

6.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 two photos；提示词 different，此处应填名词。
题目解析：首先听到了含定位词 two photos 的句子，接着咨询者问照片是否有什么特殊要求，注意这时这道题才开始。答案句为："The weather of the two shots should be different."其中 two shots 替换了题干中的 two photos，different 原词出现，不过是在答案之后才出现。因此答案为 weather。注意听录音时要带着预判的词性去有意识地抓取，不要死盯题干的顺序或某个说法，因为通常情况下，顺序或说法会在录音中进行调整或发生替换。

7.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Saturday、Morning；提示词 appropriate，此处应填名词。
题目解析：注意不要通过搜寻 appropriate 一词做题，该词被替换的可能性较高，而是要结合 Saturday、Morning 这些时间点，抓取附近出现的名词代入题干。答案句为："On Saturday morning, the instructor will explain all the basics of amateur and professional sports photography and the differences between them, followed by instructions on the use of specific equipment for various sports …"录音中先提到了 all the basics，对应上一条信息中的 Introduction，接着 followed by（然后）暗示下一条信息的出现，其中 instructions on the use of 替换了题干中的 How to choose，specific 替换了 appropriate。因此答案为 equipment。

8.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Afternoon；提示词 the，此处应填名词。
题目解析：定位词 Afternoon 出现后，注意通过语义抓取合适的名词代入题干。答案句为："… you'll have to work together to decide the best position to take these shots."其中 work together to decide 替换了题干中的 Discuss，take these shots 替换了 take photos。因此答案为 position。

9.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Sunday、Workshop；提示词 how to，此处应填动词原形。
题目解析：注意不要过度关注 how to，因为该说法发生替换的可能性很大，而是要有意识地抓取动词原形。本题两个定位词出现于同一句中："On Sunday, there is a workshop taking place in a computer-equipped room where you'll learn to edit different shots."这一句中只有 edit 是动词原形且后面跟着照片，shots 替换了题干中的 pictures。因此答案为 edit。

10.analysis:
听前预测：提示词 how to，此处应填动词原形。
题目解析：本题没有很好的定位词，注意判断语义信息的推进，然后抓取合适的动词原形。通过观察题干可知，第 10 题和第 9 题同为星期天的安排，属于并列信息，所以在听录音时，可以有意识地听表示并列关系的词汇或表达，然后搜寻附近的动词原形。并列信号词 also 暗示答案信息即将出现："There is also a section on some tricks to sell them."其中 some tricks to 替换了题干中的 Advice on how to，them 指的就是前文中的 shots，对应题干中的 pictures。因此答案为 sell。
